image:image.image:title: Rain or Shine Roofing hero image — Springfield, OR roofing contractor
image:image.image:caption: Rain or Shine Roofing serves Springfield, Eugene, and a 100-mile radius across the I-5 corridor and Oregon Coast.

image:image.image:title: Rain or Shine Roofing logo
image:image.image:caption: Official logo of Rain or Shine Roofing, Springfield, Oregon.

image:image.image:title: Tim Davis working on a residential roof in Springfield, Oregon
image:image.image:caption: Owner Tim Davis installing an asphalt shingle roof on a Springfield, Oregon home.

image:image.image:title: Completed Rain or Shine Roofing project in Lane County, Oregon
image:image.image:caption: Finished residential roof replacement by Rain or Shine Roofing in Lane County, Oregon.

image:image.image:title: Finished asphalt shingle roof on an Oregon home
image:image.image:caption: Completed roof installation by Rain or Shine Roofing showing new asphalt shingles on an Oregon residence.

image:image.image:title: Tim Davis, owner of Rain or Shine Roofing
image:image.image:caption: Tim Davis, founder and lead roofer at Rain or Shine Roofing in Springfield, Oregon.

image:image.image:title: Completed residential roof replacement
image:image.image:caption: Finished asphalt shingle roof replacement by Rain or Shine Roofing.

image:image.image:title: Rain or Shine Roofing finished project
image:image.image:caption: Completed roofing job by Rain or Shine Roofing in the Oregon Willamette Valley.

image:image.image:title: Residential roof installation in Springfield, Oregon
image:image.image:caption: Residential asphalt shingle roof installation by Rain or Shine Roofing in Springfield, Oregon.

image:image.image:title: Rain or Shine Roofing project in the Willamette Valley
image:image.image:caption: Completed roofing project within the Rain or Shine Roofing 100-mile service area.
